free_text: The (d,t) reaction in C-12, F-19 and Al-27 nuclei.
English translation
The tritons emitted from the thin target were
trapped in stacks of aluminum foils, arranged 15 cm
away from the target at various angles, starting with
7 degr. After irradiation, the tritium was extracted
from the foils by heating and was introduced into the
Geiger counter.
2.97 mg/cm2 MgF2 target sputtered on an aluminum foil
0.4 mg/cm2 thick, and a teflon (CF2) target 8.2 mg/cm2
thick were used.
No source of uncertainty is given.
